business.name: Bloom Aesthetics Clinic
business.location: Central London (exact address provided on booking confirmation)

services.name: Botox (Anti-Wrinkle Injections)
services.description: Treats forehead lines, frown lines (11s), and crow's feet. Results last 3–4 months.
services.downtime: Minimal. Avoid strenuous exercise for 24 hours.

services.name: Dermal Fillers
services.description: Adds volume and definition to lips, cheeks, and jawline. Results last 6–18 months depending on area.
services.downtime: Mild swelling for 24–48 hours is normal.

services.name: Initial Consultation
services.description: A complimentary 20-minute consultation to discuss your goals, assess suitability, and recommend a treatment plan.
services.note: Strongly recommended before any first treatment.

services.name: Skin Booster (Profhilo)
services.description: Deep skin hydration treatment using hyaluronic acid. Improves skin texture and elasticity. Two sessions recommended, 4 weeks apart.
services.downtime: Small injection bumps resolve within 24 hours.

booking.how_to_book: Via WhatsApp (+44 7700 900123) or through the website booking form at www.bloomaesthetics.co.uk/book
booking.cancellation_policy: 24-hour notice required for cancellations. Late cancellations may incur a £30 fee.
booking.payment: Card or cash accepted on the day. No deposits required for first bookings.
booking.patch_test: Not required for Botox. Fillers may require a patch test at the discretion of the practitioner.

faqs.question: Is Botox painful?
faqs.answer: Most clients describe it as a minor pinching sensation. A numbing cream can be applied on request.

faqs.question: How long do results last?
faqs.answer: Botox typically lasts 3–4 months. Fillers last 6–18 months depending on the treatment area and product used.

faqs.question: Are there any side effects?
faqs.answer: Common side effects include temporary redness, mild swelling, or bruising at the injection site. Serious side effects are rare. Our practitioners will discuss all risks at consultation.

faqs.question: Who is not suitable for these treatments?
faqs.answer: Treatments are not suitable for pregnant or breastfeeding clients, or those with certain medical conditions. Suitability is assessed at consultation.

faqs.question: Can I combine Botox and fillers in one session?
faqs.answer: Yes, combination treatments are possible and will be discussed at your free consultation.

escalation_triggers: medical question beyond listed side effects
request for pricing negotiation or discount
more than 2 questions the AI cannot answer from this SOP
explicit request to speak with a human
mention of adverse reaction or emergency
sop_boundaries: This AI assistant is authorised to answer only from the information in this SOP document. For any question outside this scope, it must escalate to a human agent rather than speculate or invent information.
